_about: EDITORIAL concision pass (not a normative decision): drop the redundant 'honest'/'honestly' qualifiers across the corpus — honesty is implied by construction (G2/no-black-boxes: a trace/error/tag that isn't honest is useless), so the adjective is filler. Also fixes the few stale 'honesty rule' name references to 'transparency rule' (post-ADR-032 rename). Same anchor-keyed, single-pass-per-file, never-silent tool (tools/dn29_apply.py --manifest this). Maintainer-directed 2026-06-24. APPLIED 2026-06-24: 60 edits across 5 files via the tool + 1 caught post-run (CLAUDE.md 'defer honestly' → 'defer', applied directly) = 61 total. status 'applied' refuses re-apply.
_kept: Deliberately UNCHANGED: the formal named criteria SC-2 '(honest bounds)' and VR-5 '(honest guarantee-strength)' (cross-referenced labels, not colloquial filler); the Glossary '(H) = honesty/architecture concept' taxonomy marker; proper-noun-ish 'honesty-integrity' (ADR-021 Gate A) and 'honest-stdlib' (prior-art ref).
